name: Case Summary
description: POC plugin that builds a one-line summary from the running case's document

en.config.title.label: Configuration name
en.config.title.placeholder: Enter a name for this configuration
en.config.currency.label: Currency code
en.config.currency.help: Currency code used when formatting amounts (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP)
en.action.titleField.label: Title field (JSON Pointer) *
en.action.titleField.help: JSON Pointer path to the title field in the case document (e.g. /applicantName)
en.action.amountField.label: Amount field (JSON Pointer)
en.action.amountField.help: Optional JSON Pointer path to the amount field in the case document
en.action.summaryVariable.label: Summary variable name
en.action.summaryVariable.help: Process variable name for the generated summary (default: caseSummary)
en.action.definitionKeyVariable.label: Definition key variable name
en.action.definitionKeyVariable.help: Process variable name for the case definition key (default: caseDefinitionKey)

nl.config.title.label: Configuratienaam
nl.config.title.placeholder: Voer een naam in voor deze configuratie
nl.config.currency.label: Valutacode
nl.config.currency.help: Valutacode gebruikt bij het opmaken van bedragen (bv. EUR, USD, GBP)
nl.action.titleField.label: Titelveld (JSON Pointer) *
nl.action.titleField.help: JSON Pointer-pad naar het titelveld in het zaakdocument (bv. /applicantName)
nl.action.amountField.label: Bedragveld (JSON Pointer)
nl.action.amountField.help: Optioneel JSON Pointer-pad naar het bedragveld in het zaakdocument
nl.action.summaryVariable.label: Procesvariabele samenvatting
nl.action.summaryVariable.help: Naam van de procesvariabele voor de gegenereerde samenvatting (standaard: caseSummary)
nl.action.definitionKeyVariable.label: Procesvariabele zaaktype
nl.action.definitionKeyVariable.help: Naam van de procesvariabele voor het zaaktypesleutel (standaard: caseDefinitionKey)

actions.title: Build Case Summary
actions.description: Reads the running case's document and writes a one-line summary as a process variable
